creator: catone@cpan.org
text:
Thank you for PR.

1. According to
http://sourceforge.net/projects/translate/files//Pootle/2.1.1/RELEASE.txt/view
1.1. Pootle 2.1.1 depends on Translate Toolkit 1.8.0.
1.2. Pootle 2.1.1 database migration depends on django 1.2

2. Have no idea why did you removed po and mo installation. Since you
didn't remove trailing slash on previouse line - it seems to be a
simple mistake.

3. Since you placed back installation of docs ('wsgi.py', 'ChangeLog',
'COPYING', 'README', 'INSTALL') - added them to pkg-plist

Updated patch attached.

On Wed, Sep 15, 2010 at 02:10, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Maintainer of textproc/pootle,
>
> Please note that PR ports/150577 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
> Â  Â http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/150577
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
>



-- 
Regards, Denis.
